note: Per-peptide adaptive intake contract. RESEARCH-POPULATED: every clinical claim must carry a real citation (FDA label / PubMed DOI-PMID / guideline) or be marked VERIFY — never fabricated. This data drives the workspace intake, the advisories, the consent tier, AND the sellable PDF intake template in each peptide's Practice Pack.

override_policy.principle: The provider can override ANY recommendation. AllyOS is decision-support, never a gatekeeper. Every override is a documented clinical decision by the licensed provider — which is what keeps the platform a tool and transfers responsibility to the provider.
override_policy.hard_stop: blocking modal requiring a TYPED override rationale; recorded in the note + consent. Highest friction, still overridable — not an absolute lock.

all_patients: weight-related comorbidities (HTN, dyslipidemia, prediabetes/T2DM, OSA, CVD, MASLD)
goal / indication (and basis: clinical vs preference)

agent_specific_screen: red-flag questions specific to this agent (pill-friendly)
hard_stops: agent-specific blocking conditions (overridable with typed rationale)

obesity_blunts_gh_axis.rule: obesity suppresses GH/GHRH response; reversible with weight loss

gh_igf1_malignancy.rule: GH/IGF-1 mitogenic; active malignancy = platform hard stop
gh_igf1_malignancy.source: acromegaly neoplasia epidemiology (PubMed) — VERIFY specific refs
